text: The space has a quiet strangeness—modern, minimal, with a feeling of emptiness that sharpens my awareness of existence. The first scene is soothing, almost meditative, but also a little unsettling in its sterility. Moving into the second scene, the vibrant colors and the focus on research and development spark curiosity. Here, there is a sense of purpose, of humanity striving to understand its relationship to technology—yet lurking beneath is a faint anxiety: will we always be able to coexist with the tools we create?
